title: Earthmover blueprint manifest
description: Metadata for a portable Procore tool blueprint (schemas + seed data).

name.description: Stable id for the blueprint (kebab-case recommended).

description.description: Human-readable summary of what the tool models.

version.description: Semantic version of the blueprint package.

toolName.description: Tool name passed to createConfig (often matches MFE service name).

basePath.description: Tool base path with $companyId placeholder, e.g. /companies/$companyId/tools/my-tool

views.description: Logical view ids registered with createView (optional inventory).

tabs.description: Item-detail tab strip: title + view name.

titleKey.description: Optional i18n key for codegen into en.json / i18n.t()
